title: Ixora graciliflora
taxonomy: Ixora graciliflora is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the genus Ixora and is commonly found in tropical regions. The Ixora graciliflora is closely related to other plants in the Rubiaceae family, which includes over 600 genera of flowering plants. This species is native to parts of Asia and is often cultivated for its showy, fragrant flowers. The classification of Ixora graciliflora reflects its evolutionary history and relationship to other plants within the Rubiaceae family.
